name: account-manager
author: hagency
description: Manage sub-accounts under the current profile

tools.name: manage_account
tools.description: Manage sub-accounts under the current profile. Sub-accounts share the parent's LLM provider and API keys but have their own data directory, memory, skills, and messaging channels. Use this tool when the user asks to create, list, delete, or inspect sub-accounts.

action.description: Action to perform: list all sub-accounts, create a new one, delete an existing one, or show info about a specific sub-account.

name.description: Display name for the sub-account (required for 'create' action). Example: 'work bot', 'personal assistant'.

sub_account_id.description: ID of the sub-account (required for 'delete' and 'info' actions). Format: parent-id--slug, e.g. 'dspfac--work-bot'.

system_prompt.description: Optional system prompt for the sub-account (used with 'create' action).

telegram_token.description: Optional Telegram bot token to configure a Telegram channel (used with 'create' action).

enable.description: Whether to auto-enable the sub-account after creation. Default: false.
